servinfo.title: Front Stabilizer Bar, Bushing and Joint Check

servinfosub.title: Stabilizer Bar
servinfosub.ptxt: Check stabilizer bar for damage and deformation. Replace stabilizer bar if check result is not OK.

servinfosub.title: Stabilizer Bar Bushing
servinfosub.ptxt: Check stabilizer bar bushing for damage and deterioration. Replace stabilizer bar bushing if check result is not OK.

servinfosub.title: Stabilizer Joint

item.ptxt: Check ball stud for smooth movement.
Check dust cover for damage and crack.
Check rod for damage and deformation.

servinfosub.ptxt: If check result is not OK, replace stabilizer joint assembly.
